title: tangy solo uruguayan chicken dinner
description: a flavorful and comforting dish from uruguay, featuring tender chicken, an aromatic broth, and a tangy twist.
instructions: in a large saucepan, combine chicken breast, chicken bouillon powder, and 2 cups of water.
bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
in a small bowl, whisk together 2 cups of water and 2 tsp of dashi extract.
stir the dashi mixture into the saucepan and continue to simmer for another 5 minutes.
season with salt and pepper to taste.
serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
